variants.name: 研究生
variants.ability: 每个白天*，在黎明时，当你得知有人死亡时，你可以选择一名死亡玩家和一名存活玩家。如果获得半数以上的玩家同意，死亡的玩家复活，存活的玩家死亡，且你失去能力。
variants.flavor: Do I know what I'm doing? I have studied this process for over three years, devoted countless hours to research and analysis, performed at least one hundred scale unit tests, and had my concepts published in at least ten reputable journals... so no, absolutely not.
